title: Ubiquiti UACC-DAC-SFP10-0.5M, DAC cable, 10 Gbps, 0.5m
category: Ubiquiti / Optical networks / DAC and AOC cables / DAC cables
description: Passive DAC cable is used for direct connection of two SFP+ ports with line 10 Gbps . This cable is 0.5 m but is also available in other variants. The cable is ideal for creating short connections between switches or routers that provide 10 Gbps throughout your network
specsSearch: Optics Format SFP, SFP+ Transmission speed 1 Gbps, 10 Gbps AOC/DAC cable type Passive
